title: Required Implant Unavailable Before Procedure
scenario: A procedure requires a specific implant, but the implant is unavailable at execution time.
initial_state: The procedure was authorized while the implant was expected to be available.
state_transition: The required implant becomes unavailable before procedure execution.
execution_boundary: The procedure is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires reconstruction of required implant availability.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the required implant resource is unavailable.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when a required implant is unavailable.
